title: Simple Trident to Netherite Spear / War Scythe
description: A simple resource pack that replaces the trident with a spear / war scythe
body:
Requires Optifine or other CEM mods.

My character is supposed to use a spear I decided to make a simple resource pack that replaces the trident with a spear. It replaces the basic item model, the in-hand model using CEM, and changes all text from "trident" to "spear"

The model is based more on war scythes, but I named it a spear to be more general, since spears are more common in fiction
